mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_card_recommendations ( user_id, card_id, card_name, card_type, issuer, estimated_benefit, annual_fee, pre_month_money, card_image_url, request_pc_url, request_mobile_url, recommended_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{cardId}, #{cardName}, #{cardType}, #{issuer}, #{estimatedBenefit}, #{annualFee}, #{preMonthMoney}, #{cardImageUrl}, #{requestPcUrl}, #{requestMobileUrl}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT recommendation_id, user_id, card_id, card_name, card_type, issuer, estimated_benefit, annual_fee, pre_month_money, card_image_url, request_pc_url, request_mobile_url, recommended_at FROM user_card_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY estimated_benefit DESC, recommended_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_card_recommendations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_card_recommendations ( user_id, card_id, card_name, card_type, issuer, estimated_benefit, annual_fee, pre_month_money, card_image_url, request_pc_url, request_mobile_url, recommended_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.cardId}, #{item.cardName}, #{item.cardType}, #{item.issuer}, #{item.estimatedBenefit}, #{item.annualFee}, #{item.preMonthMoney}, #{item.cardImageUrl}, #{item.requestPcUrl}, #{item.requestMobileUrl}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
